name: Purple and Orange Critter Slaw
recipeIngredient: 6 cups very thinly sliced red cabbage
1 pound coarsely grated or julienned carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss together the cabbage and carrots.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the sour cream, mayonnaise, mustard, lemon juice, and parsley. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Pour the dressing over the mixed vegetables and toss to coat.
4. Chill, covered, for 1 hour. Coleslaw may be made up to 1 day in advance. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
Yield: 7 to 8 cups coleslaw
